sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER, category VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10, 'A'), (2, 20, 'B'), (3, NULL, 'A'), (4, 40, 'B');
SELECT id, last_value(value ORDER BY id) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY id) AS last_value_in_category FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = last_value(value IGNORE NULLS) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY id) WHERE id = 3;
SELECT category, last_value(value) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS last_value_all FROM test_table;
